title: Color Bubbles Ultra
description: Pop all the colorful bubbles by shooting at them, and get to the boss faster than they get close to you. The faster and more accurately you cope with the task, the more points you will earn!
instructions: By clicking the mouse or finger you need to shoot at single-colored bubbles to burst them Dont let the bubbles get too low The main goal is to get to the boss and hit him with any ball
